title: ginkgo biloba f. macrophylla
intro: Ginkgo biloba f. macrophylla is a variant of the Ginkgo biloba plant, a dioecious tree known for its unique fan-shaped leaves and ability to thrive in a wide range of environments. The medicinal properties of Ginkgo biloba f. macrophylla are attributed to its flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been shown to improve blood flow and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include improved memory and cognitive function, enhanced blood circulation, and reduced risk of age-related diseases such as dementia and Alzheimer's. Ginkgo biloba f. macrophylla is often used in herbal preparations, including capsules, tablets, and teas, which are available over-the-counter and are commonly used in traditional medicine.
